title: Employee Attendance Management System
description: Use AI Agents to create an attendance management system for mobile check-ins and monthly records.
description_cn: 用 AI Agent 生成员工考勤管理系统，覆盖移动打卡、月度考勤等功能。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — Employee Attendance Management System: attendance KPIs, a monthly heatmap, and dual donut charts for status distribution. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/13-attendance-tracker.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— 考勤追踪:考勤 KPI、月度热力图和状态分布双环形图。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型:https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/13-attendance-tracker.html
